name: HydraLiquid – Revitalizing Solution with Mountain Crystal
shortDescription: Farmona Professional revitalizing solution with mountain crystal, 500 ml. Replenishes skin with minerals, regulates sebum, brightens. Approx. 50 treatments.
description:
The Farmona Professional Hydra Technology Revitalizing Solution is a special restorative solution that provides all-day freshness and clarity for the skin.

Its active formula is based on mountain crystal extract, which replenishes the epidermis with valuable minerals, supports nutrient delivery to cells, and promotes the removal of toxins.

500 ml size, sufficient for approximately 50 treatments. For professional use only.

faq.question: How many treatments does a 500 ml bottle last?
faq.answer: A 500 ml bottle is sufficient for approximately 50 treatments, which means extremely economical usage.

faq.question: Which devices can this solution be used with?
faq.answer: The solution is a professional revitalizing liquid designed specifically for hydro-abrasion and cavitation peeling procedures. Ideal for cleansing, brightening, and skin-strengthening protocols.

faq.question: What skin type is the revitalizing solution recommended for?
faq.answer: Suitable for all skin types, especially recommended for oily and problematic skin. It regulates sebum production, brightens the skin, evens out tone, and improves firmness.

whatsIncluded: 1 pc Farmona Professional HydraLiquid revitalizing solution with mountain crystal (500 ml)
